title: TrustLens capability category
description: Shared capability vocabulary. Every component (scanner, credential mapper, sandbox, blast-radius simulator) MUST describe declared, static, configured and dynamic capability using these identifiers, so that the four evidence sources can be compared for the same capability without a translation layer. Adding a value is a MINOR schema change; removing or re-meaning a value is a MAJOR change.

x-trustlens-notes.identity.*: Emitted by the credential reachability mapper (Phase 2), not by the static scanner.
x-trustlens-notes.reachability.*: Edge-shaped capabilities used by the reachability graph and blast-radius simulator; they describe a path between two modelled nodes rather than a construct in a file.
x-trustlens-notes.filesystem.write_outside_scratch: Only meaningful when a scratch/cache path has been declared. Absent a declaration, use filesystem.write and record the missing declaration as an unknown.
